feedItems.description: allocated £6.5m to Planning & Development (≈£56 per resident)
allocated £2.4m to Other Services (≈£21 per resident)
allocated £3.8m to Council Running Costs (≈£33 per resident)
allocated £4.7m to Environment & Streets (≈£41 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £105 (5.0%) to £2220
